hooks.command: TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=SessionStart TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8420 TDAI_GATEWAY_AUTO_START=0 TDAI_USER_ID=codex TDAI_GATEWAY_RUNTIME_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/runtime TDAI_GATEWAY_LOG_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/logs TDAI_GATEWAY_IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600 TDAI_GATEWAY_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_SECONDS=30 python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook session-start

TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=UserPromptSubmit TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8420 TDAI_GATEWAY_AUTO_START=0 TDAI_USER_ID=codex TDAI_GATEWAY_RUNTIME_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/runtime TDAI_GATEWAY_LOG_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/logs TDAI_GATEWAY_IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600 TDAI_GATEWAY_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_SECONDS=30 python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook prefetch

TDAI_MEMORY_HOOK_MARKER=Stop TDAI_GATEWAY_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8420 TDAI_GATEWAY_AUTO_START=0 TDAI_USER_ID=codex TDAI_GATEWAY_RUNTIME_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/runtime TDAI_GATEWAY_LOG_DIR=/Users/bytedance/.codex/tdai-memory/logs TDAI_GATEWAY_IDLE_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=600 TDAI_GATEWAY_WATCHDOG_INTERVAL_SECONDS=30 python3 -m tdai_memory_cli.hook sync-turn
